requirement_topic.en: Cell and Battery Pack Safety — BDS / IEC 62133
requirement_topic.zh: 电芯与电池组安全——BDS / IEC 62133
requirement_topic.zht: 電芯與電池組安全——BDS / IEC 62133

summary.en: Bangladesh aligns its product safety standards (Bangladesh Standards, BDS) with international standards, and for portable lithium cells and batteries the relevant safety baseline is IEC 62133-2 (Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable applications — Part 2: Lithium systems), adopted as the corresponding BDS where listed. Where the product falls within the BSTI compulsory certification schedule, the manufacturer/importer must obtain a BSTI Certification Mark (CM) licence, which involves product testing (in a BSTI or BSTI-recognised laboratory) against the applicable BDS/IEC standard and factory/quality assessment. IEC 62133-2 testing covers abuse tests (overcharge, external short-circuit, crush, drop, thermal abuse, forced discharge) and electrochemical limits. Where the product is not in the compulsory schedule, IEC 62133-2 (or an IEC/CB test report) is still the standard buyers and importers commonly require, and is the practical safety evidence for customs and distribution.
summary.zh: 孟加拉国将其产品安全标准（孟加拉标准，BDS）与国际标准对齐；对于便携式锂电芯及电池，相关安全基准为IEC 62133-2（便携式应用密封二次锂电芯及电池安全要求——第2部分：锂系统），在已列入时采纳为对应BDS。当产品属于BSTI强制认证目录时，制造商/进口商须取得BSTI认证标志（CM）许可，其包括按适用BDS/IEC标准在BSTI或BSTI认可实验室进行产品测试及工厂/质量评估。IEC 62133-2测试涵盖滥用测试（过充、外部短路、挤压、跌落、热滥用、强制放电）及电化学限值。当产品不在强制目录内时，IEC 62133-2（或IEC/CB测试报告）仍是买家和进口商通常要求的标准，也是海关和分销的实用安全证据。
summary.zht: 孟加拉將其產品安全標準（孟加拉標準，BDS）與國際標準對齊；對於便攜式鋰電芯及電池，相關安全基準為IEC 62133-2（便攜式應用密封二次鋰電芯及電池安全要求——第2部分：鋰系統），在已列入時採納為對應BDS。當產品屬於BSTI強制認證目錄時，製造商/進口商須取得BSTI認證標誌（CM）許可，其包括按適用BDS/IEC標準在BSTI或BSTI認可實驗室進行產品測試及工廠/品質評估。IEC 62133-2測試涵蓋濫用測試（過充、外部短路、擠壓、跌落、熱濫用、強制放電）及電化學限值。當產品不在強制目錄內時，IEC 62133-2（或IEC/CB測試報告）仍是買家和進口商通常要求的標準，也是海關和分銷的實用安全證據。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62133-2:2017+AMD1:2021 — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable applications — Part 2: Lithium systems (adopted as BDS where listed)
BSTI Certification Marks (CM) scheme — Bangladesh Standards and Testing Institution Act, 2018 (mandatory where product is in the compulsory certification schedule)

summary.en: China's primary safety standard for portable lithium battery packs is GB 31241-2022 (Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable electronic equipment), with GB 18287 applying to mobile-phone lithium-ion batteries. GB 31241 is technically derived from IEC 62133 but contains national deviations in test severity and acceptance criteria. A GB 31241 test report from a Chinese CNAS-accredited laboratory is a Chinese domestic compliance document; it is not automatically equivalent to an IEC 62133-2 / CB test report, and a BSTI CM licence is a separate Bangladesh assessment that GB 31241 does not satisfy on its own.
summary.zh: 中国便携式锂电池组的主要安全标准为GB 31241-2022（便携式电子设备用密封二次锂电芯及电池安全要求），手机锂离子电池适用GB 18287。GB 31241在技术上源自IEC 62133，但在测试严苛程度和验收准则方面存在国家偏差。中国CNAS认可实验室出具的GB 31241测试报告属于中国国内合规文件；其不自动等同于IEC 62133-2/CB测试报告，且BSTI CM许可是单独的孟加拉国评估，GB 31241本身不能满足。
summary.zht: 中國便攜式鋰電池組的主要安全標準為GB 31241-2022（便攜式電子設備用密封二次鋰電芯及電池安全要求），手機鋰離子電池適用GB 18287。GB 31241在技術上源自IEC 62133，但在測試嚴苛程度和驗收準則方面存在國家偏差。中國CNAS認可實驗室出具的GB 31241測試報告屬於中國國內合規文件；其不自動等同於IEC 62133-2/CB測試報告，且BSTI CM許可是單獨的孟加拉評估，GB 31241本身不能滿足。

standards_or_laws: GB 31241-2022 — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable electronic equipment (SAC/SAMR)
GB 18287-2013 — General specification for lithium-ion batteries for mobile phones (SAC)

gap.en: The cleanest evidence path for Bangladesh is an IEC 62133-2 / IEC CB test report (which BSTI and importers recognise), rather than a GB 31241 report. Key gaps for a Chinese exporter: (1) GB 31241 has national deviations and is not interchangeable with IEC 62133-2, so a CB or IEC 62133-2 report should be obtained or the existing test reviewed against IEC requirements; (2) where the product is in the BSTI compulsory certification schedule, a BSTI Certification Mark (CM) licence — involving sample testing and factory assessment — is mandatory and must be arranged through the Bangladesh-based importer/agent; (3) certification, labelling and documentation are handled locally by the importer, so the exporter must supply test reports, technical files, and product specifications in a form the importer can submit to BSTI.
gap.zh: 孟加拉国最清晰的证据路径是IEC 62133-2/IEC CB测试报告（BSTI和进口商认可），而非GB 31241报告。中国出口商的主要差距：（1）GB 31241存在国家偏差，与IEC 62133-2不可互换，因此应取得CB或IEC 62133-2报告，或将现有测试对照IEC要求审查；（2）当产品列入BSTI强制认证目录时，须取得BSTI认证标志（CM）许可——涉及样品测试和工厂评估——且必须通过本地进口商/代理办理；（3）认证、标签和文件由进口商在本地办理，因此出口商须以进口商可向BSTI提交的形式提供测试报告、技术文件及产品规格。
gap.zht: 孟加拉最清晰的證據路徑是IEC 62133-2/IEC CB測試報告（BSTI和進口商認可），而非GB 31241報告。中國出口商的主要差距：（1）GB 31241存在國家偏差，與IEC 62133-2不可互換，因此應取得CB或IEC 62133-2報告，或將現有測試對照IEC要求審查；（2）當產品列入BSTI強制認證目錄時，須取得BSTI認證標誌（CM）許可——涉及樣品測試和工廠評估——且必須通過本地進口商/代理辦理；（3）認證、標籤和文件由進口商在本地辦理，因此出口商須以進口商可向BSTI提交的形式提供測試報告、技術文件及產品規格。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where in scope — a BSTI Certification Mark (CM) licence is mandatory for products within the BSTI compulsory certification schedule; IEC 62133-2 / CB test reports are the recognised safety evidence and are commonly required by importers even outside the compulsory schedule
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market — GB 31241-2022 compliance required under SAMR framework for portable lithium batteries sold in China

source.publisher: Bangladesh Standards and Testing Institution (BSTI) — Certification Marks (CM) Wing

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For Bangladesh, IEC 62133-2 (adopted as BDS where listed) is the recognised safety baseline, and a BSTI Certification Mark (CM) licence is mandatory where the product is in the compulsory certification schedule. A Chinese GB 31241 report is a domestic document with national deviations and does not by itself satisfy Bangladesh requirements; an IEC 62133-2 / CB test report is the practical route. The exporter typically supplies test reports and technical files, while a Bangladesh-based importer/agent files for BSTI certification.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对于孟加拉国，IEC 62133-2（在已列入时采纳为BDS）是认可的安全基准；当产品属于强制认证目录时，BSTI认证标志（CM）许可为强制要求。中国GB 31241报告是带有国家偏差的国内文件，本身不能满足孟加拉国要求；IEC 62133-2/CB测试报告是实用路径。出口商通常提供测试报告和技术文件，由本地进口商/代理办理BSTI认证申报。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對於孟加拉，IEC 62133-2（在已列入時採納為BDS）是認可的安全基準；當產品屬於強制認證目錄時，BSTI認證標誌（CM）許可為強制要求。中國GB 31241報告是帶有國家偏差的國內文件，本身不能滿足孟加拉要求；IEC 62133-2/CB測試報告是實用路徑。出口商通常提供測試報告和技術文件，由本地進口商/代理辦理BSTI認證申報。
